proposal_text:
Title: Echoes of Truth: The Planetary Pulse
Concept: Listen to the world, expose humanity's lies.
Website Product Description: Step into a detective game unlike any other, where your senses transcend the ordinary. You possess a unique gift: the ability to perceive the world's hidden truths, tuning into the very 'planetary pulse'. Uncover crimes that conventional senses miss, experiencing the distress of a blighted river through subtle visual distortions, or hearing the whispers of forgotten events in an 'ancient grove' through unique auditory cues. These profound insights, gathered as 'ecological testimonies', are your crucial evidence.

But revealing these truths won't be easy. A powerful society, benefiting from the current order, will actively resist you, attempting to bury the truth with carefully crafted lies and misleading accounts. It's up to you to piece together fragmented experiences and challenge these deceptions. Use your intuitive 'logic board' to compare the planet's undeniable sorrow with human-made fabrications. Identify contradictions, expose manipulated stories, and reconstruct a complete narrative. Challenge perceptions, uncover hidden motives, and force a societal shift in a world desperate to remain oblivious.

Title: Echoes of Asphalt
Concept: Where memories linger, and cities decay.
Website Product Description: Step into *Echoes of Asphalt*, a modern mystery where the past lingers in the present. In a city shadowed by urban decay, you'll discover a world alive with "unseen connections"—digital echoes of forgotten lives and hidden societies. This isn't about weapons or quick reflexes; it's a unique adventure that challenges your mind.

As a master detective of the digital age, your tools are your wits and your keen eye. Piece together fragmented memories by meticulously examining manipulated surveillance footage, cross-referencing inconsistent public records, and deciphering spectral traces left behind. Every crumbling building and abandoned alleyway whispers a part of a larger story, offering environmental clues and engaging puzzles that reveal the city's deep-seated secrets. Confront the subtle anxieties of modern life as you uncover layers of conspiracy and truth. *Echoes of Asphalt* offers a deeply immersive narrative experience, inviting you to connect the dots in a compelling, non-combat journey where every discovery changes your perspective. Are you ready to hear the city's silent call?
